Description: My magicks allow me to summon phantasms of fish I consume in their entirety. Needless to say, I have partaken of many a piscatory dish, but not always in pursuit of acquiring arcane prowess─sometimes, I'm simply hungry. A species replete with rejuvenating energies is known to meander the depths of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>northern Lake Toari<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>. Perhaps you could fetch enough to satisfy my appetite.
